title: THE TWIDDLERS 50 Pack Mini Christmas Pinball Games for Kids – 6cm Handheld Fidget Toys in 5 Assorted Festive Designs – Nostalgic Novelty Fillers for Stockings, Crackers, and Party Bags
features: BULK ASSORTMENT – This set includes 50 mini arcade games featuring 5 distinct festive characters: Santa Claus, Snowman, Reindeer, Elf, and Penguin. It serves as an economical solution for filling bulk party bags, classroom reward boxes, or large family gatherings.

PERFECT FOR DIY CRACKERS – Measuring exactly 6cm in diameter, these compact discs are capable of fitting inside homemade Christmas crackers, advent calendar drawers, or Eve boxes. They function as a higher-quality, interactive alternative to standard paper jokes or plastic trinkets.

BATTERY-FREE RETRO PLAY – These mechanical puzzles require no batteries or assembly, offering instant, screen-free entertainment. They act as excellent "quiet toys" to keep children occupied at the dinner table or during travel without generating noise.

SKILL-BUILDING FIDGET TOYS – Beyond simple novelty, these handheld mazes help develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and patience. They function as engaging fidget tools for children who need to keep their hands busy during holiday events.

DURABLE PARTY FAVORS – Crafted from sturdy, non-toxic plastic with a sealed acrylic top, these games are built to withstand enthusiastic play without the ball becoming dislodged. This durable construction ensures they remain safe and usable long after the party ends.
description: Product Description Bundles of Fun From exciting lucky dips and wind-up toys to mini mazes and inflatable reindeer ring toss, we’ve got bundles of fun for the whole family to enjoy this festive period.
